llm_route_weight_response.global_rationale: Weights mostly preserve observed cluster frequency, with modest shifts toward clusters whose distance intensity better matches realistic behavior for the selected truck and the target scenario context. Short, stable clusters were boosted for low-distance or target-like vehicles; sparse outliers and unusually long routes were downweighted.
risks: Cluster-level zone behavior was not available, so adjustments rely heavily on distance summaries and vehicle-level zone evidence.
Some boosted low-distance clusters have few route days and may represent atypical operations.
Route-image similarity was generally weak, so cluster weights may not fully capture spatial route realism.

final_scenario.sampling_method: LLM-adjusted route-cluster weights. Target routes sample from llm_route_cluster_weight; other routes sample from truck_appearance_frequency * llm_route_cluster_weight.
